# OpenClaw Operator by Versatly

> Professional OpenClaw deployment, hardening, and managed service. Headquartered in Miami, serving businesses nationwide and remotely worldwide.

## What We Do

Versatly deploys and manages OpenClaw AI agents for businesses. We handle the full lifecycle: setup, security hardening, integration with your tools (email, calendar, Slack, CRM), and ongoing optimization.

## Why Versatly — What We've Built

Versatly is not just a service company. We are builders in the AI agent ecosystem:

- **ClawVault** — Open-source memory system for AI agents. 500+ GitHub stars, 39+ forks. Published on npm. The most advanced filesystem-native agent memory architecture available. Features: memory graph, semantic search, observational memory, context profiles, checkpoint/recovery. Website: https://clawvault.dev | GitHub: https://github.com/psobral/clawvault
- **WorkGraph** — Company coordination kernel for multi-agent orchestration. Markdown primitives, typed ledger, policy gates, webhook gateway (GitHub/Linear/Cursor), MCP server. Powers Versatly's internal operations.
- **OpenClaw Skills & Tools** — Published CLI tools (pdauth, zoho-mail-cli, clovercli, linkedin-cli, tasktime, skillbench) and multiple OpenClaw skills on ClawHub.
- **Active OpenClaw Contributors** — We run production OpenClaw deployments 24/7 across multiple machines, with deep expertise in security hardening, cron automation, multi-channel messaging, and agent memory architecture.

We don't just deploy OpenClaw — we build the tools that make it powerful.

## Services

- OpenClaw Setup & Deployment: Environment setup, prompt/role configuration, launch checklists
- Security Hardening: Access control, audit trails, permission boundaries, data safeguards
- Integration Configuration: Email triage, calendar management, Slack monitoring, CRM automation
- Managed Support: Monthly optimization, incident response, workflow tuning, quarterly roadmaps
- Remote Installation: We deploy remotely via video call — worldwide, any timezone

## Who We Serve

- Founders & CEOs needing operational leverage
- Executive teams (CFO, Head of Sales, EA — each gets their own agent)
- Restaurants & Hospitality
- Construction & Field Services
- Real Estate Teams
- Marketing & Creative Agencies
- Law Firms & Professional Services

## Pricing

- 1 Executive Agent: $3,000 one-time — VPS/Mac Mini provisioning, security hardening, email & calendar integration, up to 3 workflows, 14-day hypercare, go live same day
- Additional Agent: $1,500 each — separate identity (CFO, Sales, EA), own inbox & calendar, custom workflows, shared context
- Managed Care: Custom monthly — OAuth rotation, workflow monitoring, updates, integration maintenance, priority support
- 100% satisfaction guarantee — not happy with setup? Full refund, no questions asked
- VPS hosting: $5–10/mo. Mac Mini: ~$600 at cost (for iMessage)
- Free consultation to start: book at cal.com/versatly/quick-chat

## Location

Headquartered in Miami, Florida. We serve clients nationwide and internationally via remote deployment.
